title: Copter's Discs
description: This Mod Adds Various Discs to Minecraft
body:
This Mod is currently Incomplete

It has 30 different discs, and the complete version will have 100, also the discs in this mod cannot be obtained in creative. That will be fixed in the Complete Version.


If you would like a certain track added to this mod before completion click [Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/forums/minecraft/modding/what-s-your-favorite-tune-685587/)


All Music was NOT written by me
I do not own any of these tracks
I will Credit all Creators below:







Amazing Freddy Disc - Remixed by Ohmspino on Youtube

Vs Susie - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

An Enigmatic Encounter - Composed by Ben Diablo 

Onett Theme - Composed by Keiichi Suzuki, Owned by Nintendo

Temmie Village - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

Disc 0239471984710764 (All Minecraft Music Played Together) - Remixed by Kushi on Youtube Owned by Mojang Composed by C418, Lena Raine, Samuel Aberg, Aaron Cherof

Bonetrousle - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

Time Machine - Composed by WaterFlame Owned by WaterFlame

Tetris Theme A - Composed by Hirokazu Tanaka Owned by Nintendo

Impirial March - Composed by John Williams Owned by LucasFilms

Cool Cool Mountian - Composed by Koji Kondo Owned By Nintendo

Rush Eb - Composed by Sheet Boss Music on Youtube Owned by Sheet Boss Music on Youtube

Little Fugue in G minor - Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach Owned by The Public Domain

The Seven Seas - Composed by F-777 Owned by F-777

Battle Against a True Hero - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

Megalovainia - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

Running Up a Hill (Piano Version) - Remixed by Kathrine Cordova on Youtube Composed by Kate Brush Owned by Stranger Things

Sirtet - Remixed by C418 Composed by Hirokazu Tanaka Owned by Nintendo

Elevator Jam - Composed by LSPLASH Owned by Doors (roblox game)

Attack of a Killer Beast - Remixed by Waxalotl on Youtube Owned by Toby Fox Composed By Toby Fox, Lena Raine, Marcy Nabors

RazorMind - Composed by Simond Viklund Owned by Pay Day 2

Yucca Desert - Composed bt Hip Tanaka and Keiichi Suzuki Owned by Nintendo

Kakrico Village - Composed by Koji Kondo Owned by Nintendo

Death by Glamour - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

BIG SHOT - Composed by Toby Fox Owned by Toby Fox

Brain Eater - Composed by Epic Mountain on Youtube Owned by Kurzgesagt

Quantum Computers - Composed by Epic Mountain on Youtube Owned by Kurzgesag

All my Fellas (Pose for the Camera) - Composed by Frizk Owned by Frizk

Infinite Amethyst - Composed by Lena Raine Owned by Mojang

Lavender Town - Composed by Junichi Masuda Owned by Nintendo



Here are a list of people who inspired me to do these certain tracks:

Dragonrealm11 - Tem Shop

R3dleaf - Bonetrousle

Little Fugue G.-minor - Lord Fawful

Seven Seas - Littlecopter145

Amazing Zane - Megalovania

SallyPlaysMC - Running Up a Hill

Sirtet - Me Thinks I Want To Mod

Elevator Jam - Apro78

Razormind - Scampy_

Infinite Amethyst - Team UNNAMED
